name: R & J Transportation
recent_news: No M&A or news found; web search returned unrelated R&J/RJ-named transport entities (rjtours.com, rjtransportdivision.com), none matching the White Castle, LA micro-operator.
fit_notes: Very small (2 employees, ~$113K revenue) special-needs/NEMT micro-operator in rural Iberville Parish; no confirmed school district contracts and no web presence. Likely too small to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in.

name: Schumacher Transportation LLC
recent_news: No M&A or news found; listed on Yelp and Care.com as a small local transportation provider in Oak Park, MN. Appears to operate under MN DHS Special Transportation Services framework.
fit_notes: Sole-proprietor-style family-owned micro NEMT/special-needs operator in rural central MN (~$98K revenue, 2 employees). No yellow-bus school contracts evident; minimal scale for a Summit tuck-in.

name: Liberty Limousines
recent_news: No M&A or news found; name suggests livery/limo rather than school-bus contracting. No web presence located; unrelated Liberty Transportation LLC (DOT 2304766) and Seattle Liberty Towncar are different entities.
fit_notes: Name and structure suggest a livery/limousine operation tagged as special-needs, not a school-bus contractor. Whidbey Island micro-operator (~$98K revenue, 2 employees). Not a credible Summit tuck-in.

name: We Care Wheelchair Inc
recent_news: No M&A or news found; not specifically returned in web search. Sioux City area is served by similar small wheelchair/NEMT providers (CARE-A-VAN, Siouxland Regional Transit ADA paratransit).
fit_notes: Tiny wheelchair/NEMT operator (2 employees, ~$91K revenue). Not a school-bus contractor; outside Summit's yellow-bus tuck-in thesis.

name: Pacific Wheelchair Trnsprtn
recent_news: No M&A or news found; not located in web search. Charlotte/Raleigh area NEMT market dominated by other small operators (Caspian, VanGo, VIP NEMT).
fit_notes: Sub-scale NEMT/wheelchair micro-operator in Wake County (2 employees, ~$86K revenue, no phone listed). No school-district contracting evident; not a fit for Summit.
